title: Stage 07 Sign-off Gate
description: Stage 7 (PM Sign-off) gate. Authored by the pm agent OR by the orchestrator on the auto-fold path when Stage 6 passes cleanly with a 1:1 criterion mapping. The auto_from_stage_06 flag (additional property) discriminates the two paths.

pm_signoff.description: PM (or auto-fold) confirms acceptance criteria are met. Stage 8 cannot start without this.

deploy_requested.description: True when the user wants to proceed to deploy after sign-off; false marks the run complete here.

runbook_referenced.description: Confirms pipeline/runbook.md exists with §Rollback and §Health signals before deploy.

docs_surface_affected.description: True when the change touches a CLI flag, config key, API endpoint, or user-visible behavior that requires documentation review.

docs_updated.description: True when required docs/changelog updates are complete. Null only when docs_surface_affected is false.

docs_skipped_reason.description: Required non-empty waiver rationale when docs_surface_affected is false; null when docs updates were required and completed.

docs_gate.description: Optional orchestrator evidence for the auto-fold documentation decision.

adapter.description: Selected deploy adapter name from .devteam/config.yml (carried forward to Stage 8).

smoke_test_passed.description: Optional pre-deploy smoke result; informational at Stage 7 (the authoritative one is in Stage 8).
